name: Power of Attorney
description: A legal document authorizing one person to act on behalf of another in legal, financial, or medical matters.

sections.title: Declaration
sections.content:
I, {{principal_name}}, residing at {{principal_address}} (the "Principal"), being of sound mind, do hereby appoint:

{{agent_name}}, residing at {{agent_address}} (the "Agent" or "Attorney-in-Fact"),

as my true and lawful agent to act on my behalf in the manner and for the purposes set forth in this {{poa_type}} Power of Attorney.

sections.title: Alternate Agent
sections.content: If my designated Agent is unable or unwilling to serve, I appoint {{alternate_agent_name}}, residing at {{alternate_agent_address}}, as my alternate Agent, with all the same powers and authority granted herein.

sections.title: Powers Granted
General Authority
Limitations
Duration and Revocation
sections.content: This Power of Attorney shall become effective on {{effective_date}}. I reserve the right to revoke this Power of Attorney at any time by providing written notice to the Agent. This Power of Attorney shall be automatically revoked upon my death.

sections.title: Agent's Duties
Third-Party Reliance
sections.content: Any third party who receives a copy of this Power of Attorney may rely upon the authority granted herein and the representations of the Agent. No third party shall be liable for acting in good faith reliance upon this Power of Attorney.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: This Power of Attorney shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law_state}}.
